text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 261 

PRE_ICL_COSTSHARE_TYPE 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Cost Share Type 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates the type of cost sharing that drugs on the tier are subject to during the pre-initial coverage 
limit (ICL) phase, which may include copayment, co-insurance, or the greater/lesser of the two. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_COSTSHARE_TYPE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files)
